# Tickets

> Open-source agile ticket tracker built with Laravel. Includes a Kanban board, knowledge base, real-time collaboration, and a REST API.

Tickets is a full-featured project management tool. AI agents can interact with it entirely through its REST API using Bearer token authentication.

## API Reference

- [Authentication](README.md#authentication): Generate a token from the user profile page (`/user/api-token`). All requests require `Authorization: Bearer YOUR_TOKEN`.
- [Health Check](README.md#health-check): `GET /api/v1/health` — returns `{"status": "ok"}`.
- [Lookups](README.md#get-lookups): `GET /api/v1/lookups` — returns statuses, types, importance levels, projects, milestones, releases, and users with their IDs.
- [List Tickets](README.md#list-tickets): `GET /api/v1/tickets` — filter by `status`, `unassigned`, or `pulse`.
- [Create Ticket](README.md#create-ticket): `POST /api/v1/tickets` — requires `subject`; optional `description`, `type_id`, `importance_id`, `project_id`, `milestone_id`, `due_at`, `estimate`, `storypoints`.
- [Add Note](README.md#add-note--update-ticket): `POST /api/v1/tickets/{id}/note` — supports `body`, `status_id`, `hours`, `claim`. The body supports slash commands: `/decision`, `/blocker`, `/action`, `/assign`, `/status`, `/hours`, `/estimate`, `/close`, `/reopen`.
- [Resolve Thread](README.md#resolve-thread): `POST /api/v1/tickets/{id}/notes/{noteId}/resolve` — requires `resolution_message`.
- [Pulse](README.md#get-ticket-pulse): `GET /api/v1/tickets/{id}/pulse` — returns execution state (ON TRACK, AT RISK, BLOCKED, IDLE), latest blocker, next action, latest decision, open threads.

## Key Concepts

- **Ticket Pulse**: Real-time execution state. Check pulse before acting — a BLOCKED ticket needs unblocking, not more status updates.
- **Slash commands**: Add structured signals to notes. Use `/blocker` for blockers, `/decision` for decisions, `/action` for action items. These are parsed and surfaced in the pulse.
- **Lookups first**: Always call `/api/v1/lookups` to get valid IDs for types, statuses, importance levels, and projects before creating or updating tickets.

## CSV Import

- [CSV Import](README.md#csv-import): Bulk-create tickets via `/tickets/import`. Columns: Type Name, Subject, Details, Importance Name, Status Name, Project Name, Assigned To User Name. Projects must exist before importing.

## Source & Community
